title: Viewer/Permissions Question ! pls help
excerpt: I would like to share one board in a workspace to someone in my company that doesn’t have a monday.com account. Aside from using the shareable link feature, is there any other way to do this? I don’t want them to see any…

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to share one board in a workspace to someone in my company that doesn’t have a monday.com account. Aside from using the shareable link feature, is there any other way to do this? I don’t want them to see any other workspace or nay other board besides the one.

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rchl - A good way to do this is to make a new table view, then go to the share settings:

image872×434 33.4 KB

Copy the sharable link, and send it to who you’d like to share it with:

image669×632 34.2 KB

It creates a version of the board that they can see but can’t touch:

image1710×869 57.4 KB

Hopefully this works for you! Let me know if you have any questions.

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Greg,

Thanks for this response!

Have a good weekend.

Best,
Rachel
